name: closed-loop test exits with status code zero when every pipeline step passes verification
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'all_steps=passed' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
